# Sourdough Notes

## Starter Maintenance

Feed the starter 1:1:1 ratio (starter:flour:water) every 24 hours at room temperature. When the starter doubles in 4-6 hours and has a domed top with bubbles throughout, it's ready to use.

## Basic Loaf

Mix 450g flour, 375g water, 100g active starter, 9g salt. Autolyse for 30 minutes before adding salt. Do four sets of stretch-and-folds over two hours, then bulk ferment 8-12 hours at cool room temperature.
